# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for the Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Tenant ID for the Key Vault access policies."
      }
    },
    "applicationObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object IDs of application service principals allowed to read and list secrets."
      }
    },
    "additionalObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Additional object IDs allowed to read and list secrets."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Key Vault SKU."
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable soft delete."
      }
    },
    "enablePurgeProtection": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable purge protection."
      }
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow Azure Virtual Machines to retrieve certificates stored as secrets from the vault."
      }
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow Azure Disk Encryption to retrieve secrets from the vault."
      }
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow ARM template deployments to retrieve secrets from the vault."
      }
    },
    "publicNetworkAccess": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Enabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Enabled",
        "Disabled"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public network access setting."
      }
    },
    "networkAclsDefaultAction": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Allow",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Allow",
        "Deny"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Default network action."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "allAccessObjectIds": "[union(parameters('applicationObjectIds'), parameters('additionalObjectIds'))]",
    "accessPolicies": "[concat(createArray(createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', subscription().tenantId, 'permissions', createObject('keys', createArray('Get', 'List'), 'secrets', createArray('Get', 'List'), 'certificates', createArray('Get', 'List'), 'storage', createArray('Get', 'List')))), if(greater(length(variables('allAccessObjectIds')), 0), array(), array()))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "enablePurgeProtection": "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[parameters('publicNetworkAccess')]",
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "[parameters('networkAclsDefaultAction')]",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
            "permissions": {
              "keys": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ],
              "secrets": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ],
              "certificates": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ],
              "storage": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "copy": {
        "name": "accessPolicyCopy",
        "count": "[length(variables('allAccessObjectIds'))]"
      },
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/accessPolicies",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/add')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[variables('allAccessObjectIds')[copyIndex('accessPolicyCopy')]]",
            "permissions": {
              "keys": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ],
              "secrets": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ],
              "certificates": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ],
              "storage": [
                "Get",
                "List"
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
